detectors.description:
CryptoRoulette (CryptoRoulette.sol#19-118) contract sets array length with a user-controlled value:
	- gamesPlayed.push(game) (CryptoRoulette.sol#79)
detectors.markdown:
[CryptoRoulette](CryptoRoulette.sol#L19-L118) contract sets array length with a user-controlled value:
	- [gamesPlayed.push(game)](CryptoRoulette.sol#L79)

detectors.description: CryptoRoulette.play(uint256).game (CryptoRoulette.sol#73) is a storage variable never initialized
detectors.markdown: [CryptoRoulette.play(uint256).game](CryptoRoulette.sol#L73) is a storage variable never initialized

detectors.description:
CryptoRoulette.kill() (CryptoRoulette.sol#103-111) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- msg.sender == ownerAddr && now > lastPlayed + 21600 (CryptoRoulette.sol#105)
detectors.markdown:
[CryptoRoulette.kill()](CryptoRoulette.sol#L103-L111) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- [msg.sender == ownerAddr && now > lastPlayed + 21600](CryptoRoulette.sol#L105)

detectors.description:
Deprecated standard detected suicide(address)(msg.sender) (CryptoRoulette.sol#107):
	- Usage of "suicide()" should be replaced with "selfdestruct()"
detectors.markdown:
Deprecated standard detected [suicide(address)(msg.sender)](CryptoRoulette.sol#L107):
	- Usage of "suicide()" should be replaced with "selfdestruct()"

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.23 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.23 (CryptoRoulette.sol#1)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CryptoRoulette.play(uint256) (CryptoRoulette.sol#65-99):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.transfer(this.balance) (CryptoRoulette.sol#83)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- lastPlayed = now (CryptoRoulette.sol#97)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [CryptoRoulette.play(uint256)](CryptoRoulette.sol#L65-L99):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.transfer(this.balance)](CryptoRoulette.sol#L83)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [lastPlayed = now](CryptoRoulette.sol#L97)
